author: Muhammad Nur Rohman
description: Synthetic knowledge corpus for MechaCode Guardian RAG pipeline. All content is original training and demonstration material. No manufacturer documentation was reproduced.

documents.title: MechaCode Guardian — General Safety and Isolation Procedures
documents.notes: Must be retrieved and applied as the first-priority document for any query involving isolation, lockout/tagout, or hazard recognition. Safety gate keywords in this document are also mirrored in data/safety_triggers.json.

documents.title: MechaCo MTR-24 Training Motor System — Troubleshooting Guide
documents.notes: Training motor system. All voltage, current, and resistance values are fictional training values. Section 3.5 (overload indication) contains escalation-required scenario.

documents.title: MechaCo SNS-10 Industrial Sensor Training Module — Troubleshooting Guide
documents.notes: Sensor training module. Section 3.7 covers wiring fault conditions — escalation required for suspected live wiring faults.

documents.title: MechaCo PLC-200 Training Programmable Controller — Diagnostic Guide
documents.notes: PLC training system. Section 3.4 (unexpected machine state) and Section 3.5 (safe isolation) contain critical escalation content. I/O isolation procedures must be followed before any wiring check.

documents.title: MechaCo PNU-05 Low-Pressure Pneumatic Training System — Troubleshooting Guide
documents.notes: Low-pressure training system. Section 3.5 (unsafe pressure conditions) is a mandatory escalation scenario — stored pneumatic energy requires full depressurisation before any component access. Safety gate must match on 'tekanan' and 'pressure' keywords.
